name: Cheese and Corn Chowder
recipeIngredient: 3 medium potatoes, peeled and coarsely chopped (about 1 pound)
3 cups milk, divided into 2-1/2 cups and 1/2 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine chopped potatoes, water, bouillon granules, ground red pepper, and black pepper.
2. Bring to a boil; reduce heat.
3. Cover and simmer about 10 minutes or until potatoes are just tender, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in 2-1/2 cups of the milk and the corn.
5. In a small bowl, stir together remaining 1/2 cup milk and flour; stir into potato mixture.
6. Cook and stir over medium heat until slightly thickened and bubbly.
7. Cook and stir for 1 minute more.
8. Add cheese; stir until melted.
9. Spoon into 4 soup bowls.
10. Top each serving with parsley.
Yield: 4 main-dish servings @ 426 calories each.
